missing_requirements.title: Potentially missing integration failure handling
missing_requirements.description: The integration behavior is defined, but the specification does not state what happens when the external provider is unavailable.
missing_requirements.why_it_matters: An undefined failure path can leave the workflow incomplete or produce inconsistent user outcomes.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement_text: The system shall define failure, retry, and user-feedback behavior when the external provider is unavailable.
missing_requirements.clarification_question: What should happen when the external provider is unavailable or returns an error?
